sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42382" key="e)rhmosko/pos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρημο-σκόπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42382.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who keeps watch negligently,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
